candidates.why: Component of operating revenue; however total revenue line provides the aggregate top-line figure preferred for REVT.
Explicit aggregate top-line revenue matching definition of REVT; equals sum of operating revenue components.
Other operating income, but less clearly part of core top-line than Total Revenue row.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Residual financial income; not top-line operating revenue.
Financial income; not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to owners; not revenue.
Balance sheet liability; not a revenue line.
Deferred revenue liability; not the P&L revenue line.

variables.notes: Use 'Total Revenue' as primary top-line; include 'Revenues from sale of goods' as a fallback historical label if presentation changes.

candidates.why: Explicit cost of goods sold line; best match for direct production costs (COGS).
Likely operating personnel costs (SG&A-type) rather than direct COGS; company also separately discloses Cost of Goods Sold.
Broad operating overhead bucket, not exclusively direct COGS.
Financing, not cost of sales.
Financing, not cost of sales.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Operating overhead, not direct cost of goods sold.
Operating overhead, not direct COGS.
Balance sheet asset; not an expense line.
Balance sheet asset; not an expense line.
Balance sheet liability; not an expense line.

variables.notes: 'Cost of Goods Sold' is a clearly labeled direct cost of sales line and should be used alone for COGS.

candidates.why: Operating income, not an SG&A expense; should be excluded from XSGA.
Operating income, not expense; should be excluded from SG&A components.
Broad category of operating overhead expenses; fits SG&A definition well (excluding D&A/impairments).
Vague residual operating line with no numbers in preview; less clearly SG&A than 'Other Operating Expenses'.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. SG&A is composed of operating overhead components. The best expense buckets are 'Employee beneft expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'. The candidate list only includes 'Other Operating Expenses' as an expense; adding 'Employee beneft expenses' (not in the XSGA candidate list) better captures personnel-related SG&A. D&A and impairment lines are excluded per instructions. Marked for manual review because a key SG&A component was selected from outside the suggested candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Employee beneft expenses
No research & development-related line item appears in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews, so XRD is treated as missing (0).

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense related to lease liabilities; valid component of interest expense series.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Main interest expense line excluding capitalized portion; best primary choice for XINT.
Generic interest expense line, but appears unused here; kept as fallback label if used in other years.
Net financing result; can serve as a fallback when detailed interest lines are unavailable.
Refers to non-controlling interests in profit, not interest expense; should not be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure mirroring lease interest; secondary fallback after main lease interest line.
Equity line, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: primary corporate interest expense, then lease interest, then generic interest expense, then the net finance result as a last-resort fallback.

candidates.row_label: Share of results of equity-accounted investments
candidates.why: Income statement share of associates; not an equity balance measure.
Non-current asset, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Other equity - not recognized in the income statement
candidates.why: Component of equity, but not total; using it alone would understate book equity.
Component of equity; negative retained earnings/other reserves; not total equity.
Represents total shareholders' equity. Minority interest is separately disclosed and appears zero, so this line appropriately reflects equity attributable to owners for BE.
Total equity including any minority interest; less suitable than 'TOTAL EQUITY' when a separate equity line exists.

variables.notes: 'TOTAL EQUITY' is the consolidated shareholders’ equity amount and excludes any separate minority interest line; it best matches BE for the denominator (BE + MIB).

candidates.why: P&L attribution of profit, not the balance sheet minority interest amount.
P&L attribution of profit, not the balance sheet minority interest amount.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; correct match for MIB even if currently zero.
Combined equity and minority interest; using this would double count with BE, so it should not be mapped directly to MIB.

variables.notes: Use the Balance Sheet 'Minority Interest' line as the non-controlling interests component MIB; P&L minority lines are not used for the equity denominator.
